tours_main_tour_step_0: Welcome! Let us take you on a quick tour to show you how to use the GoSBEL tool to generate Spring Boot.
tours_main_tour_step_1: From here, you can add new elements to the diagram, such as an Entity.
tours_main_tour_step_2: Here you can save your diagram to your browser's local storage so you can return to it later.
tours_main_tour_step_3: From here, you can access the list of your previously saved works and restore them.
tours_main_tour_step_4: This is the main engine! Click here to generate Java (Spring Boot) code based on your diagram.
tours_main_tour_step_5: If you want to view/edit the raw XML data or export it, use this button.
tours_main_tour_step_6: Need help or want to learn more about the project? Click here.
tours_main_tour_step_7: Here you can edit the name of your application.
validation_first_error: {{text}} "{{field}}" must be english characters, no spaces, not empty, and cannot start with a number.
popup_export_download_zip: Download code as a zip file.
popup_export_download_jar: Download code as a jar file.
info_1_2: Ctrl + E to Generate an Entity
info_1_3: Ctrl + C to generate the code
info_2_1: run the build_jar that is the same as your OS
info_2_2: You will find the jar file in the target/ folder
confirmation_helper_saved: The diagram has been saved to your browser!
confirmation_helper_no_nodes: No Nodes to generate Code from.
